reasoning: The anomaly originated at the A1 interface (connecting the Non-RT RIC to the Near-RT RIC) and propagated downstream to the F1-c interface (connecting the O-CU to the O-DU).
actionable_steps: 1. Perform a network trace on the A1 interface to identify the source of the latency. 2. Check the resource utilization (CPU/Memory) of the Non-RT RIC and Near-RT RIC. 3. Validate the configuration of the A1 transport network.
